title: redact_token_query_param breaks query-param auth for EventSource and WS clients
description: handle_jmap_eventsource and handle_ws_events authenticate via ?token= query param; the redact_token_query_param middleware replaces token=VALUE with token=REDACTED in req.uri() before next.run(req), so axum's Query extractor gives the handler params.token = Some("REDACTED") — the constant-time comparison always fails, silently denying browser SSE and WebSocket clients that cannot set Authorization headers
